description: Binary sentiment classification prompts ending with the sentiment label.

documents.text:
Classify the review sentiment as positive or negative.
Review: The meal was fresh, warm, and carefully prepared.
Sentiment: positive

Classify the review sentiment as positive or negative.
Review: The package arrived broken and the instructions were missing.
Sentiment: negative

Classify the review sentiment as positive or negative.
Review: The support team answered quickly and solved the problem.
Sentiment: positive

Classify the review sentiment as positive or negative.
Review: The app crashed twice and lost my saved work.
Sentiment: negative
